description: Endor Labs provides application security and software supply chain security tooling, including dependency, vulnerability, secret, and code scanning. Its platform helps teams analyze and manage risk across source code, open source packages, and AI-assisted development workflows.
summary: Endor Labs exposes a REST API at `https://api.endorlabs.com/v1`, the `endorctl` CLI, and a local stdio MCP server; all require Endor Labs-issued authentication, primarily an `ENDOR_TOKEN` or API key/secret for CLI-backed flows.
